name: MGM-1A "Phaethon"
description: The MGM-1A Phaethon is a first-generation microgravity miner built around a spring-loaded anchor-and-percuss cycle. Three expanding piton anchors fire into the surface at deployment, securing the unit against reaction forces; an internal flywheel provides momentum cancellation during drill operation. Suited to near-Earth asteroids and small icy moons where bulk gravity cannot be relied upon to keep equipment grounded.
